name: Curry Pie Crust for Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend 1 cup whole wheat flour, 1 cup white flour, and 3 teaspoons curry powder together until combined.
2. Add 8 ounces cream cheese in quarter pieces to the mixture and mix until well incorporated.
3. Gradually add 3-6 tablespoons ice water until a dough forms.
4. Wrap the dough in waxed paper or plastic wrap and refrigerate for one hour.
5. After chilling, roll out the dough between two pieces of waxed paper to fit a 9-inch pan.
6. Peel off the top piece of waxed paper and turn the pastry side down into the pie pan.
7. Remove the second piece of waxed paper and press the pastry dough into the pan.
8. Trim and decorate.
